text.message: Well you're not saying yes to the nb so it's not
Well you're not trading it in general so...
What has happened to this website
the community used to be so wholesome
now everyone who chats has such a bitter tone
People tell me stuff like that quite often
Hard to be friendly when I'm not being traded a resource I need and is also common to the person that has it
just build ur roads and spare us
I'm just surprised oj didn't take the 10/9 double ore
That's why I took the 8/10/5 left in the first place :/
